title: How to adopt AI work tools inside the apps your team already uses
description: A practical guide to using AI where work already happens: in docs, spreadsheets, chat, and connected files. It explains the likely benefits, the real limits, and the questions to ask before rolling anything out.
search_question: How should a team adopt AI work tools inside existing apps safely?

revisions.summary: Created a durable explainer on adopting AI work tools inside existing apps, focusing on workflow fit, human review, permissions, and current examples from OpenAI, Microsoft, Anthropic, and Google.

editorial_basis: Generated only from Clearforge research packs that had already passed publication approval and material-claim verification.
